queries.query:
from(bucket: "lunar-mission")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "eclss")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pressure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "lunar-gateway")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "lunar-mission")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mobility")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rpm" or r["_field"] == "traction")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "lunar-gateway")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "lunar-mission")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "eclss")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "lunar-gateway")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

// 1. Define your base data variable
data = from(bucket: "lunar-mission")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mobility")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "lunar-gateway")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

// 2. Display the actual voltage data
data
  |> yield(name: "actual_voltage")

// 3. Create a fake stream for the limit line
// CHANGE '15.0' BELOW TO YOUR DESIRED BATTERY LIMIT
data
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: 15.0, _field: "low_battery_limit" }))
  |> yield(name: "limit_line")

from(bucket: "lunar-mission")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "eclss")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "radiation")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "lunar-gateway")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "lunar-mission")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "comms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "latency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "lunar-gateway")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

spec.description: Dashboard Containing all necessary Values for monitoring
spec.name: Mission Control
